patch.value: Promote execution and diagnostics primitives to the public SDK: linked-test running and test-run lifecycle, search eval harness, telemetry stats/export

Completes SDK coverage of the command surface beyond pm-oxrw (which covers validate/health/gc only): pm test / test-all execution plus the test-runs worker lifecycle (list/status/logs/stop/resume), the search eval benchmark harness (pm eval, offline BM25 vs provider comparison from PR#314), and telemetry stats/percentiles/export hooks (PR#286, PR#233 OTLP queue). pm-zwpp promotes linked-test STORAGE; this item promotes EXECUTION. The pm-lodl inventory validates this is the final uncovered family. Duplicate check: no open SDK-promotion overlap (searched test/eval/telemetry promote).

SDK exports typed primitives for linked-test execution and run lifecycle control, eval harness runs, and telemetry stats/export returning the same structured outputs the CLI prints; CLI commands consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change (test-runner, eval, telemetry specs green).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation slicing 2026-07-10 (grounded in current src state). Already public — do NOT redo: partial core substrate exists — src/core/test (background-runs.ts, item-test-run-tracking.ts, run-selectors.ts) and src/core/telemetry (consent.ts, observability.ts, runtime.ts); the stats facade is exported from src/sdk/index.ts. The actual gap: orchestration is command-side — test.ts (2,358, the largest command module in the repo) + linked-test-parsers.ts (576) + test-all.ts (632) + test-runs.ts (312) + eval.ts (223) + telemetry.ts (463) + stats.ts (229), ~4.8k lines total. Suggested slices: S1 linked-test execution + run lifecycle primitives (~120m) — move test.ts orchestration onto core/test; the parser layer (linked-test-parsers, 576 lines) is pure functions and promotes almost for free; cover test-runs list/status/logs/stop/resume as one lifecycle primitive. S2 batch execution + background-run supervision (~60m) — test-all.ts; preserve the Windows detached-spawn child.on("error") handling (PR#365 regression class). S3 search-eval harness primitive (~60m) — eval.ts; this is the substrate pm-atfm (graded golden-workspace eval harness) builds on — coordinate; promoting S3 early cheapens pm-atfm, which sits `related` to wave-2 frontier item pm-55ra. S4 telemetry stats/export + typed facades + SDK reference docs/tests (~60m) — consent gating must live in the primitive, never CLI-only, so SDK consumers cannot bypass it. Order: S1 first (bulk + risk), S3 next (unblocks eval work), S2, S4 last. P3 overall — this slice serves tooling depth, not the pm-w89s universality story, so schedule after zwpp/3mna/oxrw.
